Long and flowing, drifting endlessly in gentle current
Wild and tangled past her waist, knotted with salt
Thick braids woven with tiny shells, trailing down back
Sleek and wet, clinging to shoulders and spine
Heavy with ocean weight, cascading well past her hips
Smooth and silky, fanning out like an underwater veil
Loose waves dripping saltwater, tumbling over her shoulders
Intricately braided with coral fragments, reaching her waist
Wild untamed mane whipping violently in storm wind
Rope-thick and coarse, thrashing behind her in current
Gentle curls drifting weightlessly around face and chest
Waist-length with windswept texture, floating like seaweed strands
Glossy and streamlined, flowing behind her like silk ribbons
Matted with brine and kelp, hanging past shoulders heavily
Elaborate crown braid cascading into long flowing ends
Spiraling tendrils swirling around her in circular patterns
Shoulder-length layers rippling like ocean waves in motion
Waterfall of straight strands pooling around her submerged form
Twisted rope braids reaching down to the small of back
Delicate wisps and long locks billowing in tidal pull
Thick mane spreading outward, suspended in deep water stillness
Messy fishtail braid unraveling down length of her spine
Voluminous and wavy, floating cloud-like past her waist
Fine strands clumped together, draping heavily to her hips
Windswept and wild, streaming behind her during surface breaches
